query:
SELECT id, name, enableLipSync, masterPortraitUrl IS NOT NULL as hasPortrait FROM videoCharacters WHERE jobId = 510098;
SELECT id, status, errorMessage, updatedAt FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE id = 510098;
